## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run doctor`
- [ ] `npm run security:check`
- [ ] `npm run readiness:prod` if runtime behavior changed

## Docs

- [ ] docs updated if topology, env, validation, migration, or policy changed

## Risks

- runtime-dependent constraints
- rollback notes
